data.description: Modern Next.js scaffold optimized for AI-powered development with Z.ai. Built with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui.

EFZ Robotics-6353EFZ Robotics-6353EFZ Robotics-6353——REBUILT————REBUILT————REBUILT——

A Decade of Engineering Heritage (2016-2026) | EFZ Shanghai

"We redefine the boundary between simplicity and power."

INTERACTIVE DASHBOARD

360° CONNECTIVITY

Explore our global network through three strategic terminals. Hover over each terminal to reveal detailed information.

TERMINAL A
Campus Integration
MENTORING●

Mentoring Qiu Chengtong Class (Top STEM students) - guiding the next generation of engineers

EVENTS●

Campus Open Days - Showcasing innovation to prospective students and families

SOCIAL●

Annual Robot Carnival + Collaborative events with Team 6907 (Fudan International)

TERMINAL B
Global Connectivity
MENTORSHIP●

Cross-border mentorship for Team 11429 (Australia) - sharing expertise across continents

EXCHANGE●

Collaborative exchange with American Team 2718 (hosted by them)

NETWORK●

Hosting Teams 11352 (Chengdu) and 6399 (Jinan) — welcoming fellow Chinese teams for hands-on collaboration and cultural exchange.

TERMINAL C
Social Outreach
EDUCATION●

STEM enlightenment for Zhangjiang Kindergarten - inspiring young minds

INDUSTRY●

Industry visits to Fourier Intelligence - Connecting classroom to real-world applications

CONTENT●

Consistent updates on our official WeChat account — one post every two days. Our approach gains wide recognition and is adopted by other teams as a benchmark.

TERMINAL D
10th Anniversary Celebration
EXPERT INSIGHT●

Google engineer joins us on-site, sharing cutting-edge technology insights and industry perspectives — a rare opportunity for face-to-face dialogue that sparks innovation.

ALUMNI DIALOG●

A UC Berkeley alumna engages the team with thought-provoking questions, bringing an international perspective and fostering deep conversations that open new horizons.

LEGACY STORY●

Former team captain from SJTU reflects on the team's ten-year journey — from humble beginnings to moments of triumph — passing on the spirit of perseverance and tradition through firsthand stories.

SUSTAINABILITY

Operational & Financial Dashboards

Transparent operations driving sustainable growth and continuous improvement

Strategic Partnership

Long-term collaboration with Zhangjiang Group and HAAS, establishing a robust foundation for technological advancement and resource sharing.

Institutional Support

Deeply rooted in EFZ (No.2 High School of East China Normal University) and ECNU (East China Normal University), benefiting from world-class educational resources.

Funding Usage

Hardware & Materials42.8%
Software & Materials23.5%
Mentoring Fees12%
3D Printing & Consumables10.8%
Registration Fees8.5%
Promo & Souvenirs2.2%
